overall.description: First-person gameplay footage depicting a nighttime walk from a rural industrial building past a sandy beach waterfront, pausing to observe the Milky Way galaxy, then continuing along the shore toward a parking area. The scene transitions from artificial lighting under an awning to open starlit coastal terrain.

agents.ego_description: walking along the side of an industrial building past wooden barrels and a dumpster

illuminated red and blue neon sign in window
stacked wooden barrels and trash bags along the building wall
overhead metal roof structure providing shelter

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person view walking alongside a rural industrial building at night. The area is dimly lit by artificial light, with wooden barrels and a metal dumpster visible along the concrete path.

scene_state.functional_zone: open beachfront with bench and streetlamp overlooking water

events.description: exits the sheltered building corner into the open beach area with visible sky and horizon

agents.ego_description: turning right and walking along the sandy beach toward the water

entered.detail: tall pole with bright light illuminating the bench and sand
simple wooden bench facing the water
expanse of sand leading down to the water
dark water meeting the night sky with distant lights visible

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right and emerges from the building's shelter into an open beachfront area. A streetlamp illuminates a wooden bench on the sand, with the dark water and distant city lights visible on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: night sky observation point on beach

events.description: camera tilts upward from the horizon to focus on the Milky Way galaxy

agents.ego_description: stopping to look up at the star-filled sky and Milky Way

entered.detail: bright band of the Milky Way stretching across the night sky with dense star clusters
numerous stars visible in the clear dark sky

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts upward to reveal a stunning view of the Milky Way galaxy and dense star field. The ground elements exit the frame as the view focuses entirely on the celestial display above.

events.description: camera tilts down from the sky and resumes walking along the shoreline

agents.ego_description: walking along the sandy shore with the water to the left and distant lights ahead

entered.detail: uneven sandy terrain with small rocks and sparse vegetation
dark water visible to the left of the path
scattered lights from distant buildings across the water

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts down from the sky and continues walking along the sandy coastal path. The terrain is uneven with sparse bushes, and distant lights from buildings are visible across the dark water.

scene_state.functional_zone: beachside parking area with utility building

events.description: approaching built parking area with street lighting and parked motorcycle

agents.ego_description: walking toward a parking area with a motorcycle and utility building

notable_agents.action: motorcycle parked under streetlamp near the utility building

entered.detail: small industrial shed or utility structure with closed doors
multiple street lamps illuminating the parking area
asphalt or concrete parking lot surface replacing the sand

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches a developed area with a paved parking lot, street lighting, and a small utility building. A motorcycle is parked under the lights as the camera moves forward, leaving the open beach behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey that transitions from a dimly lit industrial perimeter into a vast starlit coastal landscape before returning to a developed parking area. It begins by walking along a concrete path beside a rural industrial building, passing wooden barrels and a metal dumpster under artificial light. As the camera turns right and emerges from the shelter, the scene opens onto a sandy beachfront where a streetlamp illuminates a wooden bench against a backdrop of dark water and distant city lights. The view then tilts upward to replace the horizon with a dense, stunning display of the Milky Way galaxy before tilting back down to continue along an uneven coastal path dotted with sparse bushes. Finally, the camera moves away from the open shore toward a paved parking lot, passing a parked motorcycle and a small utility building under the glow of street lighting.
